final:
module echo_cancellation(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input [15:0] signal_in,
    input [15:0] echo_ref,
    output reg [15:0] signal_out
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            signal_out <= 16'b0;
        end else begin
            // Simple echo cancellation logic
            signal_out <= signal_in - echo_ref;
        end
    end
endmodule
